content: hey are you coming home for dinner tonight? the kids keep asking. i know work is crazy right now but you've been at the office til 11 every night this week. at least text me if you're going to be late. love you.
Your Amazon order has been delivered! "The Hard Thing About Hard Things" was left at your front door. Rate your delivery experience.
Congratulations! You've been pre-approved for a $50,000 personal line of credit at 3.9% APR. Act now — this exclusive offer expires in 48 hours. Reply STOP to opt out.
🏈 TRADE DEADLINE ALERT: Dan offered you Ja'Marr Chase for your Davante Adams + 2nd round pick. Respond by 11:59 PM or the trade expires. Your record: 6-3.
NOTICE: Annual fire safety inspection scheduled for your unit on Thursday between 10am-2pm. Please ensure access to all smoke detectors. Management will enter with master key if no one is home.
Hi! You missed your 6AM class today. No worries — your next Barry's Bootcamp session is tomorrow at 6:00 AM. Keep the streak alive! 💪 Reply SKIP to cancel.

Hi sweetheart. Your father and I saw something on the news about AI companies and I got worried. They made it sound very dramatic. Are you safe? Is your company in trouble? Call me when you get a chance. Also Aunt Linda says hi and wants to know if you're coming for Thanksgiving. Love, Mom
DEF CON 35 CFP REMINDER: Your talk proposal "Supply Chain Attacks on ML Model Registries" is due in 14 days. Submit at cfp.defcon.org. Early bird registration closes Nov 30.
Dan paid you $47.00 for "poker night 🃏"
Your order is ready for pickup! 2 suits, 3 dress shirts. Martinizing Dry Cleaning, 412 University Ave. We close at 7 PM today.
IMPORTANT: Your vehicle warranty is about to expire. Call 877-914-6233 NOW to extend your coverage before it's too late. This is your FINAL NOTICE.
Stanford Libraries: Your hold on "Superintelligence: Paths, Dangers, Strategies" by Nick Bostrom is ready for pickup at Green Library. Hold expires in 7 days.

I read your latest preprint. The mechanistic interpretability results are strong but I think you're underselling the steering vector work. Come by office hours Thursday — I'd like to discuss before you submit to NeurIPS. Also: the department holiday party is Dec 15. — Prof. Chen
URGENT: The future of AI regulation is at stake. Donate $25 to the Tech Accountability PAC before midnight to make your voice heard. Every dollar counts. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
Petco Reminder: Oscar is due for his annual wellness exam and vaccinations. Book online or call your local Petco Vet at (650) 555-0199. 🐾

Your post "Why alignment toolkits need to be open source" is trending on Hacker News (342 points, 187 comments). Top comment: "This is exactly what we needed. The walled-garden approach to safety research is insane."
Hi! Your bike tune-up is complete. New chain, adjusted derailleurs, trued rear wheel. Total: $127. Ready for pickup at Volta Cycles anytime before 6pm. 🚲
爸爸你什么时候回来？妈妈说你在做很重要的工作。我今天数学考了100分！老师说我是全班最聪明的。你能周末带我去公园吗？
通知：下周一至周三，3号数据中心将进行年度消防演练。届时部分区域将暂时断电。请各部门提前做好数据备份工作。——后勤保障部
老赵发红包了 [¥88.88] 备注：老同学聚会定在下月15号，北京饭店，谁来举个手 🙋
刘教授：各位同学，今年的校友年会改为线上举办。请大家填写问卷，链接在群公告里。另外，有人知道张伟的近况吗？好久没联系了。
你今天能早点回来吗？你妈打了三个电话了。她说你两个星期没给她打电话了。我帮你挡了但你自己打一个吧。晚饭我做好了，在冰箱里。
Server: Genshin Impact CN · #daily-commissions — MiHoYo: Version 5.4 update is live! New character banner: Mavuika rerun. Maintenance compensation: 600 Primogems sent to mailbox.
您的京东订单已发货！《深度学习：花书》预计明天送达。订单号：JD2026110587432。
儿子，妈今天去医院体检了，都挺好的，你别担心。就是血压有点高，医生让少吃盐。你工作别太累了，注意身体。对了，你表姐下个月结婚，你能请假回来吗？

dude did you see the game last night?? absolute meltdown in the 4th quarter. also — are we still on for poker next friday? mike says he's in. bring beer this time, last time you showed up with that weird kombucha.
Tesla Service: Your Model Y is due for annual maintenance. Schedule your appointment at tesla.com/service or call (703) 555-0188. Estimated service time: 2-3 hours.
REMINDER: You have an appointment with Dr. Morrison on Thursday at 2:30 PM. Please arrive 15 minutes early. Reply CONFIRM to confirm or call (650) 555-0142 to reschedule.
Your DoorDash order from Thai Basil is on its way! Estimated delivery: 35-45 min. Track your order in the app.
You've been selected for an exclusive 0% balance transfer offer! Move your existing balances to our card and pay NO interest for 18 months. Limited time. Reply STOP to opt out.
Sarah paid you $320.00 for "ski house deposit 🎿"
Chris: anyone going to the Dartmouth-Harvard game next weekend? I can get a table at Canoe Club after. Also Jake just made partner at Sequoia, drinks are on him 🥂
The school called — Emma got into the spring play! She's so excited. Also the dishwasher is making that noise again. Can you call the repair place? I'm in meetings all afternoon. Miss you.

Priya: Is anyone going to reunion this year? I heard they're doing a panel on "Williams Grads in Public Service" and they want speakers. Nominating you obviously 😄
Tom: seconded
Mark: lol you'd have to get security clearance for the whole campus
State Dept Facilities: Building C elevator bank 2 will be out of service Wednesday 7AM-5PM for annual inspection. Please use elevator bank 1 or stairs. We apologize for the inconvenience.
